<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band05_chunk003.pdf#page=10 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band05 p118 -->

<!-- header: KLOSTER INDERSDORE -->

<!-- header: CLOSTER INDERSDOR -->


[[File:Band05_chunk003_p010_img001.jpg|thumb|W<sub>s</sub> Bekehrung des hl. Augustinus]]



[[File:Band05_chunk003_p010_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band05_chunk003_p010_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band05_chunk003_p010_img004.jpg|thumb|W<sub>6</sub> Taufe des hl. Augustinus]]



----
II



----
IIG
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band05 p119 -->
